title: dactylorhiza elata subsp. sesquipedalis
intro: Dactylorhiza elata subsp. sesquipedalis is a type of orchid, a flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family (Orchidaceae) and is commonly known as the tall marsh orchid. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza elata subsp. sesquipedalis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
